pages.text: These blocks seems to resonate well with the Illagers. Perhaps they can be seen as the stone to their beloved Dark Oak.

pages.title: Cobbled Ominous Stone
pages.text: By breaking Ominous Stone, you can obtain its cobbled counterpart. Much like regular cobblestone, you can smelt it to obtain Ominous Stone.

pages.title: Cobbled Ominous Stone Path
pages.text: Using a Pickaxe on a Cobbled Ominous Stone will turn it into a path the same way dirt paths are made with shovels.
Wall Shrines can be attached to sides of a block and functions as decoration.

pages.title: Ominous Statues
pages.text: These statues are made in the likeness of an ancient illager warrior. Their brazier counterparts can have their fire put out or ignited by right-clicking on them.
